message:
Command `# DRT-0302 on bterm VDDIO. Let me check if VDDIO is in the design at all.
# The padframe uses VDDIO for the I/O power. VDDIO should NOT be a bterm in standalone design.
#
# Check the DEF file for VDDIO pins
grep -n "VDDIO" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
232519:    - VDDIO + NET VDDIO + DIRECTION INOUT + USE SIGNAL
402682:    - VDDIO ( PIN VDDIO ) + USE SIGNAL ;
